source_pr.title: test: fix unstable test TestStaleReadProcessorWithSelectTable
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: YangKeao <yangkeao@chunibyo.icu>

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #37228

Problem Summary:

If the test takes more than 5 seconds to run, it will fail.

### What is changed and how it works?

Extend the staleness in the test. The threshold is now extended to 100 seconds (just a random big number)

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to environment/external dependencies (resource contention, ports, or real cluster timing). This PR stabilizes it by: test: fix unstable test TestStaleReadProcessorWithSelectTable.

evidence: evidence: test: fix unstable test TestStaleReadProcessorWithSelectTable
